reasoning: As of June 22, 2025, XRP is trading around $2.14, having recently peaked at $2.40 earlier in the month following news of an XRP ETF launch on June 18 and a delay in the SEC appeal until August. The Polymarket price for this market on June 12 was 0.03, indicating a very low probability even earlier in the month. For this market to resolve YES, XRP would need to experience a drastic crash of over 34% from its current price to drop to $1.40 or below before the end of June. A flash crash of that magnitude on a 1-minute candle is possible but highly unlikely absent extreme negative news, and the current bullish/stable news environment (ETF launches, delayed SEC action) reduces downside risk in the short term. Because it has not touched $1.40 so far in June (the local low was around $2.06) and only 8 days remain, the probability is extremely low. I estimate the probability at 2%.
